title: From the Ashes
overview: Jailed for her husband's crime, a woman discovers that her only way out is to solve riddles from her mysterious past.

title: Cryptex
overview: A short philosophical satire that wanders between the absurd and the profound. From a silent bed stare to a prophetic lentil, Cryptex explores the rituals of modern existentialism — one cup of coffee and one book at a time.

title: Procedure 402
overview: ​In a sterile, white room, a young applicant meets an indifferent boss. What starts as a common job interview quickly turns into a surreal negotiation about morality and daily routines when it becomes clear that disposing of 'rejects' is part of the company's standard procedure. 'Vorgang 402' is a minimalist look at human adaptability in an absurd working world.

title: Absence
overview: After their father’s death shatters the fragile balance of their family, a distant mother tries to reconnect with her children as grief resurfaces buried resentments. With the one person who held them together gone, they must decide whether they can become a family on their own, or remain permanently broken.

title: John Rambo
overview: The origin story of a young John Rambo during the Vietnam War.

title: Worse Than Death
overview: When an isolated woman attempts to escape from her abusive marriage, she must decide what her life and her faith really mean to her.

title: Le Train de Minuit: Sous l'Emprise de Luisa
Dragon
overview: Set in 1967 around International Opium Trade by Afghan Trading Company and Golden Trading Company

title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
overview: The second live-action adaptation of the animated trilogy. Plot TBA.

title: Baahubali: The Eternal War – Part 1
overview: The murdered Prince Baahubali enters the afterlife and joins an eternal war between gods and demons across 14 realms.

title: VENDETTA-BEAST MODE
overview: From pain to power, hero evolves into deadly Beast Mode.

title: Nacrose
overview: In a post-apocalyptic future, a deadly disease called the "Entraxe" dominates the world. Gabrielle, a cleaning lady in a laboratory, discovers she has the "Entraxe."

title: Applause
overview: Two teenagers encounter a rock that gives them the power to switch places with the clap of their hands. However, one of the boys struggles with bullying, relationship issues, and sexual identity as he tries to navigate the world as a young adolescent.

title: ROOMMATES
overview: Turning to a website to find a roommate, a young man’s life takes a turn for the worst.

title: Lonely Road
overview: We follow the day to day life of Rylee, a girl navigating the harsh realities of homelessness and addiction. Every choice becomes a matter of survival-forcing her into situations no one should have to face as she struggles to find money, meaning, and a way forward.

title: Shadows of the Circle
overview: A Whispering Tree begins whispering the names of the lonely at midnight and luring them into fog, three college friends set out to investigate the campus legend — only to discover that the truth behind the myth is far darker than they ever imagined.

title: born blue
overview: PLEASE NOTE: June 2027 is not a confirmed date. It is our target completion date and may change.  Born In Blue is produced using Unreal Engine. Unreal Engine is a trademark or registered trademark of Epic Games, Inc. All rights reserved.  Set in Mount Gambier, South Australia, the film follows Lumy, a young girl who witnesses her father’s sacrifice at the edge of the mysterious Blue Lake. Growing up with unhealed trauma and an unexplainable power tied to the water itself, Lumy retreats into science while being quietly hunted by forces she doesn’t fully understand.  Years later, she forms a deep connection with a broken but kindred soul, Ashton. Together, they become scientists and uncover a dangerous truth buried beneath the lake one that links Lumy’s existence to a phenomenon capable of reshaping reality. As the past resurfaces and the hunters return, Lumy must confront what her father died to protect. Born In Blue is a story of grief, survival, inheritance, and the cost of love.

title: Dino Alert - The Ogglies Strike Back
overview: A dinosaur egg turns up in Schmuddelfing and an incredibly cute baby dinosaur hatches out. The Olchis and their friends now see it as their responsibility to protect the baby from curious explorers and treasure hunters. With the help of a mysterious time machine, they embark on an action-packed adventure to bring the baby dinosaur safely back to its own time and find its parents.

title: The Artist
overview: A young man addicted to sex sees a great opportunity to become a film critic.

title: Black Creek: Retribution
overview: ln 1891 Arizona, a gritty frontier sheriff wages a bloody war against a murderous cult leader and his crazed followers after they kill her deputy, forging  an unlikely alliance with Apache warriors, a grizzled outlaw and a U.S. Marshal to bring retribution to the lawless outlying territory of Black Creek.

title: Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse
overview: Hunted by Miguel O'Hara's Spider Society and betrayed by his friends, Miles finds himself in the darkest corners of the Spider-Verse in search of a way home. Knowing that his family has been not only fractured but endangered by his calling, it's a race against the clock for Miles to travel across the wildest reaches of time and space to fight for and reunite everything he holds most dear.

title: Любопытная Варвара. Тайны востока
overview: Varya, a girl who knows everything about forensics and dreams of becoming a great detective like her grandfather, and her best friend Vasya, who is ready to do anything for adventure, will once again prove that childhood curiosity and faith in goodness are stronger than any difficulty.

title: Untitled Ocean's Prequel
overview: Before Danny Ocean ever stepped foot in Vegas, two masterminds taught him everything he knows — his parents. And in 1962, they pull off an epic heist during the Formula One Monaco Grand Prix.

title: Before I Do
overview: A lakeside bachelor party weekend devolves into chaos when the groom and his best man’s past romantic feelings reignite, entangling the wedding party in the chaotic pre-wedding drama

title: Shrek 5
overview: The fifth film in the Shrek franchise. Plot TBA.

title: Mondele
overview: A Congolese-American teen with dreams of becoming the next Spike Lee races to finish his passion project while balancing cultural expectations, a strict mother, and the weight of immigrant life in Portland, Maine.
